scripts.build: bun run --cwd ui build && bun run --cwd workers/api build && bun run --cwd workers/processor build
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd ui lint && bun run --cwd workers/api lint && bun run --cwd workers/processor lint
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd ui typecheck && bun run --cwd workers/api typecheck && bun run --cwd workers/processor typecheck
